_meta.purpose: Reverse-engineered Tecimer customer account + order architecture. Use this to mirror the same flow on alasalicustomjewelry.ca but adapted for B2C (Stripe payment instead of Purchase Order, no 'TBD' pricing).
_meta.stack: Magento 2 (Tecimer's commerce engine) — we are NOT migrating to Magento; we replicate the UX in our Next.js + DatoCMS stack.

Account Information: Contact Information (name + email + Edit + Change Password)

ordersPage.noteOnStatus: Tecimer orders sit 'Pending' until staff weigh actual product and finalize price. For Al-assali B2C with Stripe, statuses should be: Pending → Confirmed → In Production / Crafting → Shipped → Delivered (or Cancelled / Refunded).

header: ESTIMATED WHOLESALE PRICE banner (skip on B2C; replace with normal subtotal)

exampleRow.name: N612 - YELLOW GOLD SOLID DIAMOND CUT ROPE LINK

customerProfileFields: Default Billing Address (street, city, province, postal, country, phone)
Stored payment methods (we'll use Stripe SetupIntents instead of Magento Vault)

checkoutFlow.noteForAlassali: Replace 'Purchase Order' with Stripe Checkout (we already have Resend for email, add Stripe). Allow guest checkout BUT push 'Create account to track this order' on the success page.
